message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Simulation de Fourmis

participant "AntFacadeController" as Controller
participant "Soldat" as Soldat
participant "Ouvriere" as Ouvriere
participant "Fourmi" as Fourmi
participant "Noeud" as Noeud
participant "Fourmilière" as Fourmilie
participant "Grille" as Grille
participant "Random" as Random

activate Controller

box "1 play" #LightBlue
  activate Controller
  box "loop [Fourmilière f in listeFourmilières]" #LightGreen
    activate Controller
    box "loop [Fourmi f in listeFourmis]" #LightYellow
      activate Controller
      alt "Fourmi instanceof Soldat"
        activate Soldat
        Soldat->Grille: 3 noeudsLibres
        activate Grille
        Grille-->>Soldat: 4 ArrayList<Noeud>
        deactivate Grille
        Soldat->Random: 5 nextInt()
        activate Random
        Random-->>Soldat: 6 int
        deactivate Random
        Soldat->Noeud: 7 setPosition:Noeud
        activate Noeud
        Noeud-->>Soldat: 8 void
        deactivate Noeud
        Soldat-->>Controller: 9 void
        deactivate Soldat
      else "Fourmi instanceof Ouvriere"
        activate Ouvriere
        Ouvriere->Grille: 11 noeudsLibres
        activate Grille
        Grille-->>Ouvriere: 12 ArrayList<Noeud>
        deactivate Grille
        Ouvriere->Noeud: 13 getNourriture()
        activate Noeud
        Noeud-->>Ouvriere: 14 nourriture
        deactivate Noeud
        Ouvriere->Noeud: 15 getPheromones()
        activate Noeud
        Noeud-->>Ouvriere: 16 pheromones
        deactivate Noeud
        Ouvriere->Random: 17 nextInt()
        activate Random
        Random-->>Ouvriere: 18 int
        deactivate Random
        Ouvriere->Noeud: 19 setPosition:Noeud
        activate Noeud
        Noeud-->>Ouvriere: 20 void
        deactivate Noeud
        Ouvriere->Noeud: 21 getNourriture
        activate Noeud
        Noeud-->>Ouvriere: 22 nourriture
        deactivate Noeud
        Ouvriere->Noeud: 23 setNourriture(int)
        activate Noeud
        Noeud-->>Ouvriere: 24 void
        deactivate Noeud
        alt "transporte nourriture"
          Ouvriere->Noeud: 25 ajouterPheromones(int)
          activate Noeud
          Noeud-->>Ouvriere: 26 void
          deactivate Noeud
        end
        Ouvriere-->>Controller: 27 void
        deactivate Ouvriere
      end
      deactivate Controller
    end
    deactivate Controller
  end
  deactivate Controller
end

box "loop [Noeud n in Grille]" #LightCyan
  activate Controller
  Controller->Noeud: 28 evaporer(int)
  activate Noeud
  Noeud-->>Controller: 29 void
  deactivate Noeud
  deactivate Controller
end

Controller--x: 30 void

@enduml
```
